scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p public/fonts && cp _assets/fonts/TT_Trailers_Black.woff2 public/fonts/ && cp _assets/fonts/TT_Trailers_Black.woff public/fonts/ && cp _assets/fonts/TT_Trailers_Bold.woff2 public/fonts/ && cp _assets/fonts/TT_Trailers_Bold.woff public/fonts/ && cp _assets/img_grade_bg.webp public/img_grade_bg.webp
